title: monday-crm Outlook Calendar 2-way sync with Emails and Activities
excerpt:

posts.author: juan.pyco (Juan)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’d be such a game changer if outlook calendar was a bi-directional intergation with the “Meeting” Activity in the Emails and Activities app/widget.

Basicaly be able to rather than save a summary of a meeting, you could actually book your meetings from monday crm, and have updates to the booking sync regardless on where you updated them (monday crm or outlook), without having to use make, or zappier.

Basically have outlook calendar function the same way that outlook email works with the Emails and Activities app/widget.

Seem to me this is a feature that would be widely used and not a niche need.

Please vote

JP
